LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LEO MCFADDEN'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH ONE FINAL OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND. IN THE PROPOSED THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF MUST SET FORTH THE DATES WHEN DEFENDANT ALLEGEDLY THREATENED "TO HAVE PLAINTIFF KILLED IN AT LEAST TWO OCCASIONS DURING TELEPHONE CALLS IN WHICH DEFENDANT COMPLAINED TO PLAINTIFF ABOUT PLAINTIFF'S LAWFUL PETITIONING." THE AMENDMENT IS TO BE FILED WITHIN TEN DAYS OF COURT'S ORDER SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
